hook.summary: UGC creator reacts with shock and disbelief to a classic tactical shooter menu screen.
hook.visual_action: A man wearing sunglasses is keyed over a game menu featuring tactical soldiers, gesturing wildly.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Ain't no way, bro. For real? For real? For real?

scene_flow: UGC creator expresses shock at the game's availability on mobile.
Creator continues to react excitedly while the game menu remains static in the background.
The App Store badge is prominently displayed throughout the entire clip to drive immediate conversion.
audience_proxy: Young male gamers 18-30 who enjoy tactical shooters and follow high-energy UGC reaction content.
